creator: jethro@jethron.id.au
text:
Doesn't fix the issue for me. Same behavior as before the ugrab patch; up arrow doesn't work, resetting keyboard shortcuts to default makes it work again until you start a new X session.

I might have messed up the patch apply or something, hopefully someone else can test & confirm.

Thanks for sticking with this Guido, can appreciate it's frustrating trying to fix an issue you can't replicate.
